subject: [PATCH v5 04/21] nfsd: allow nfsd to get a dir lease with an ignore mask

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch allows the NFS daemon to obtain a directory lease with an ignore mask, enabling it to selectively ignore certain notification types when requesting a directory lease. The patch introduces a new function `nfsd_notify_to_ignore` that maps notification types to corresponding flags in the file lease structure. This change is made to improve the flexibility and customization of NFS directory leases.
